1507400001.korean:
건물 내부에 있는 적을 찾아 제압한다.
맨날 철충만 상대했는데 오랜만에 우리 특기 분야 임무네.
1507400001.english: We'll hunt down and take out the enemies inside the building. We usually only face Ironworms, so it's nice to finally have a mission in our wheelhouse.

1507400002.korean: 인질을 지키는 건 나에게 맡겨줘! 모두 보호할 테니까!
1507400002.english: Leave the hostages to me—I’ll keep everyone safe!

1507400003.korean: 아쉽지만 이번 임무에는 인질도 보호할 대상도 없어.
1507400003.english: Sorry, but there are no hostages or anyone to protect on this mission.

1507400004.korean:
그런가… 그래도 문제없다!
인질이 없다면 동료들을 지킬 뿐이니까!
1507400004.english: Is that so… Still, no problem! If there are no hostages, I’ll just protect the squad!

1507400005.korean:
드라코는 걱정이 없구나.
적진 한 가운데 있게 될 텐데.
1507400005.english: Draco doesn’t have any worries, does she? She’ll end up right in the middle of the enemy line.

1507400006.korean: 쟤가 걱정 같은 걸 할 일이 어디 있겠어?
1507400006.english: Where would she even have time to worry?

1507400008.english: She’s coordinating the operation with the commander.

1507400009.english: So we’ve got some time before we set out?

1507400011.korean: 재미있는 이야기라니… 얼마 전에 봤던 막장 드라마 얘기라던가?
1507400011.english: Fun stories? Like that cheesy drama we saw recently?

1507400012.korean: 그건 나도 알아! 방에서 다 같이 봤잖아.
1507400012.english: I know that one! We all watched it in the room.

1507400016.korean: 이건 내가 얼마 전에 겪은 일인데.
1507400016.english: It’s something that happened to me not long ago.

1507400017.korean: 한밤중에 자고 있는데 새벽 두 시쯤, 갑자기 문을 두드리는 소리가 들리는 거야.
1507400017.english: I was sleeping in the middle of the night, and around two a.m., I suddenly heard a knock on the door.

1507400018.english: Huh? Not a fun story but a ghost tale?

1507400019.english: I was scared, but I mustered up courage and opened the door…

1507400021.english: I tried to go back to sleep…

1507400022.korean: 그때 다시 한번 문을 두드리는 소리가 나는 거야.
1507400022.english: Then I heard the knocking again.

1507400024.english: But, as expected, nobody was there.

1507400025.english: So I lay down to try sleeping again.

1507400026.korean: 그런데 그때… 나는 어떤 사실을 눈치챘어…

1507400028.english: That it had already become morning.

1507400029.english: Huh? So that’s it? The end?

1507400032.english: But it was fun, wasn't it?

1507400034.korean:
자, 재미있는 시간은 여기까지.
엄마 오셨어.
1507400034.english: Alright, that's all the fun for now. Mom's here.

1507400035.english: Mongoose Team, I'll give the operation briefing.

1507400036.korean: 이번 작전의 목표인 레모네이드 제타를 제압하기 전에 먼저 전산실을 확보해야 합니다.
1507400036.english: Before we take down Lemonade Zeta, the target of this operation, we need to secure the computer room first.

1507400037.korean: 모두 건물 내부 구조의 정보를 확인했으리라 생각합니다만, 가장 바깥쪽에 있는 방이 전산실입니다.
1507400037.english: I assume everyone has checked the building's layout, and the outermost room is the computer room.

1507400038.korean: 곳곳에 철충화된 고블린들이 있으니 모두 경계를 늦추지 마세요.
1507400038.english: There are Ironworm‑infested goblins everywhere, so stay on guard.

1507400039.english: Draco, please lead and protect everyone.

1507400041.korean:
…불가사리는 팀원이 진입할 수 있도록 길을 열어주세요.
열리지 않는 문이 있다면 파괴도 허가합니다.
1507400041.english: …Bulgasari, please clear a path for the team to enter. If there's a door that won't open, you're authorized to smash it.

1507400043.korean:
미호는 후방에서 적들의 제거를 부탁합니다.
알고 있겠지만 저들은 더 이상 바이오로이드가 아닙니다. 망설이지 마세요.
1507400043.english: Miho, please take out the enemies from the rear. As you know, they're no longer biroids. Don't hesitate.

1507400045.korean: 마지막으로 핀토는 정찰 및 시야 확보, 적들의 교란을 부탁합니다.
1507400045.english: Finally, Pinto, please handle scouting, securing sightlines, and disrupting the enemies.

1507400047.korean:
아무쪼록 무리하지 마세요.
드라코와 너무 떨어지지 마시고요.
1507400047.english: Please don't overexert yourselves. And don't stray too far from Draco.

1507400049.korean:
아앗! 치사해! 핀토만 쓰다듬어 주고!
엄마 저도요!
1507400049.english: Ah! That's cruel! Just pet Pinto! Mom, me too!

1507400050.korean: 이번 작전이 무사히 끝나면 모두 쓰다듬어 드릴게요.
1507400050.english: If this operation ends safely, I'll give everyone a pat.

1507400052.english: Alright, Mongoose Team, let's begin the operation.
